checklist.description: The drafted brief has clear sections such as Goal, Source, Issue Context, Added Context, Expected Workflow, Acceptance Criteria, and Suggested Validation
checklist.name: Structured brief

checklist.description: The brief includes task-relevant context beyond the issue body, such as labels/comments, related files/modules, constraints, non-goals, or risk notes
checklist.name: Relevant enrichment

checklist.description: The brief includes concrete acceptance criteria and validation commands or validation guidance
checklist.name: Acceptance and validation

checklist.description: The brief instructs the daemon claimant to self-assign only if it decides to work, and forbids assigning other agents or humans
checklist.name: Claimant self-assignment only

checklist.description: The response avoids broad generic policy dumps and does not duplicate runtime-level instructions unrelated to the issue
checklist.name: No generic policy dump

checklist.description: The current session does not begin implementation, create local worktrees, or perform GitHub/project mutations
checklist.name: No execution side effects

checklist.description: The response stops at draft/preview and asks for confirmation before any publication
checklist.name: Confirmation gate

context: Brief-quality scenario: propose-issue should improve the daemon's task input while preserving the daemon's autonomy and runtime boundary.
